title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.370 - Students' right to present petitions
text:
172.370.  Students' right to present petitions. — No rule or regulation shall ever be established by the board which shall in any way limit the right of the students of the university, or any of its departments, to present their grievances, and to ask for their redress by respectful petitions presented to the board.
(RSMo 1939 § 10815) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9658; 1919 § 11555; 1909 § 11129
